{{Quote|There's nothing like trying to blast out of Mos Eisley, then your ship decides it's ready for the junkyard.|Okeefe complains about her freighter|<ref name="Sandbound on Tatooine">{{GalaxyCite|10|Sandbound on Tatooine}}</ref>}}
'''''Pok's Demise''''' was a freighter owned by the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]]. Her [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] friend, [[Tru'eb Cholakk]], helped secure the finances for the ship, which Okeefe named after her former boss at the [[Klatooinian Trade Guild/Legends|Klatooinian Trade Guild]], [[Pok Nar-Ten]]. He had sold her into slavery for failing to pay her debts.

Okeefe crashed ''Pok's Demise'' into the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]] while picking up cargo from [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Some local [[Scurrier/Legends|scurriers]] had entered the ship, drawn by the scent of [[glaze cake]]s, and gnawed on the ship's wiring. This caused damage to her ion drives and shield generator, which Okeefe failed to notice on take off. She was being chased by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]], and so failed to run a systems check.

The ship crashed into the Dune Sea and was further damaged; its ventral gun mount and underbelly sensors were scraped off. Okeefe resolved to sell the ship as scrap to [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] in order to raise funds to purchase a new starship.
